title: Morning Supplications
description: Duas to be recited in the morning

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.english: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us and unto Him is the resurrection.

title: Evening Supplications
description: Duas to be recited in the evening
